props.message:
THE HEARTWORKS

A glassed-in observatory beneath the Murk. The Source can be seen here in slow, steady pulses — each one a heartbeat of the realm.

Watch for as long as you like. It will not stop while you watch.

Faded notice on the inner wall:

'Each pulse is a kept promise. No promise is kept silently — there is always a song in it. The reader who counts pulses also hums.'

— Thallin, Heart-Reader, two ages ago.

root.speaker: Heart-Reader Velis
root.text:
*she has one hand on the glass and her eyes half-closed.*

Quiet, walker. I am counting.

...there. Two thousand and fourteen since dawn. The realm is well today.

choices.label: Have you a hint for me?

count.speaker: Heart-Reader Velis
count.text:
Heartbeats. The realm has them. Each one is the Source breathing in and out. Each one is a small kept promise.

When the count slows, somewhere a shrine is dimming. When the count steadies, somewhere a walker has done something kind.

choices.label: Have you a hint for me?

hint.speaker: Heart-Reader Velis
hint.text:
*she turns from the glass, finally.*

The pulses make a song-glyph if you stand here long enough. Three high beats, one low, three high again. The realm hums it to itself.

If you ever learn to hum back, walker — the right doors might open for you.

bye.speaker: Heart-Reader Velis
bye.text: Walk well. Step quietly through the next door. The pulses notice.
